shapes.frame_eqs_str: a['xp']=0.53129; a['yp']=0.25; a['xcorr']=((a['yp']*0.18)+0.3); a['ang']=(a['time']*150); a['xq']=(a['xp']*Math.sin(a['ang'])); a['yq']=a['yp']; a['zq']=(a['xp']*Math.cos(a['ang'])); a['xp']=((a['xq']*Math.sin(a['ang']))+(a['zq']*Math.cos(a['ang']))); a['yp']=a['yq']; a['zp']=((a['xq']*Math.cos(a['ang']))-(a['zq']*Math.sin(a['ang']))); a['xq']=a['xp']; a['yq']=((a['yp']*Math.sin(a['ang']))+(a['zp']*Math.cos(a['ang']))); a['zq']=((a['yp']*Math.cos(a['ang']))-(a['zp']*Math.sin(a['ang']))); a['zq']=(a['zq']+3.14); a['xs']=div(a['xq'],a['zq']); a['ys']=div(a['yq'],a['zq']); a['x']=Math.min(Math.abs(((a['xs']*5)-a['xcorr'])), 1); a['y']=Math.min(Math.abs(((a['ys']*1.3)+0.5)), 1); a['r']=Math.min(Math.abs(Math.sin(a['time'])), 1); a['g']=(1-Math.min(Math.abs(Math.sin(((1-a['r'])*3.14))), 1)); a['b']=Math.min(Math.abs(Math.sin((1-a['g']))), 1); a['rad']=((((a['bass']+a['mid'])+a['treb'])+2)*0.05);
